opinion: Police forces, prison systems, and so-called "justice" are tools of oppression. Total anarchy is the only way to foster peace and love in society.
Abolish the police and the prison system; replace them with community-led "restorative justice".
Defund the police and reallocate funds to social workers and affordable housing.
Implement national standards for police body cameras and use of force while increasing training for de-escalation.
Maintain current police funding and standards.
Expand stop-and-frisk, increase police funding, impose stricter penalties for misdemeanors and felonies, and eliminate paroles.
Expand the death penalty, curtail prosecutorial discretion and woke policies, and deploy the National Guard to high-crime areas with authorization to use lethal force.
Implement an absolute law-and-order approach: summary executions for offenders of the law and deploying the military in high-crime areas.
Eliminating crime requires cutting it off at the root. Brain-computer interfaces to monitor people's thoughts and trigger emergency kill-switches are the only answer.
